title: Halo: Combat Evolved on PowerMac G4
description: Full installation guide for Halo on G4. Download links, 1.5 patch, widescreen fix, and performance settings for smooth gameplay.
author: Altivec Gaming
content:
Can a G4 Run Halo?

Yes! Halo runs great on G4s with 800MHz+.

Installation

Download installer, mount DMG, drag to Applications.

Performance Settings

800x600, shadows off, decals low for smooth 30-40fps.
